summary: Day 9 Stripe Payment Integration testing completed. Fixed critical route ordering bug in payments.ts. All 17 backend tests pass. Frontend payment success banner verified on ClientPortal. PaymentTracker component exists but no accepted quotes have income records to test display.
action_items: Note: Stripe API calls will fail with 'sk_test_emergent' key (Emergent proxy key, not real Stripe). Endpoints handle this gracefully with 500/503 errors.
QuotesTab PaymentTracker displays only when accepted quotes have associated income records. Current accepted quotes have no income records.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Route ordering in payments.ts - moved /by-quote/:quoteId and /session/:sessionId/status BEFORE generic /:incomeId routes to prevent route conflicts
Stripe lib/stripe.ts initializes without crashing when STRIPE_API_KEY is an invalid test key
Webhook handler properly rejects requests with invalid/missing signatures
All payment endpoints correctly require authentication

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Payment success banner verified on ClientPortal with ?payment=success query param

context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe payment integration tested. Key findings: (1) Route ordering bug FIXED in payments.ts - specific routes now before generic :incomeId routes. (2) All payment endpoints handle missing Stripe key gracefully (503 error). (3) Webhook rejects invalid signatures (400 error). (4) PaymentTracker component renders but requires income records to be created when quotes are accepted - current accepted quotes don't have income records linked. (5) ClientPortal shows green payment success banner when ?payment=success query param is present. (6) Authentication middleware working on all protected endpoints.

features_tested.GET /api/payments/:incomeId/status: PASSED - Returns 401 without auth, 404 for non-existent income
features_tested.GET /api/payments/by-quote/:quoteId: PASSED - Returns 401 without auth, 404 for non-existent quote
features_tested.POST /api/payments/:incomeId/deposit: PASSED - Returns 401 without auth, 404/503 for non-existent income
features_tested.POST /api/payments/:incomeId/final: PASSED - Returns 401 without auth, 404/503 for non-existent income
features_tested.GET /api/payments/session/:sessionId/sta: PASSED - Returns 500/503 with invalid Stripe key
features_tested.Route ordering fix: FIXED - /by-quote and /session routes now before /:incomeId routes
features_tested.ClientPortal payment success banner: PASSED - Green banner shows with ?payment=success URL param

stripe_integration_notes.api_key: sk_test_emergent is an Emergent proxy key, not a real Stripe test key
stripe_integration_notes.behavior: Endpoints handle gracefully - return 500/503 when Stripe SDK calls fail
stripe_integration_notes.webhook_secret: whsec_test configured - rejects invalid signatures properly

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - real endpoints tested. Stripe calls fail gracefully due to invalid test key.
